messages.content: Add an FAQ section with 4 common questions people ask before starting a vending machine business.

context.title: Coffee vending for offices
context.metaDescription: Coffee vending machines for modern workplaces.

props.heading: Old headline
props.body: Coffee vending machines for offices keep teams stocked with fresh drinks without anyone owning a brewing rota. A managed machine covers restocking, cleaning, and fault response so facilities can stay focused on the building.

faqItems.answer: Startup costs vary depending on whether you purchase new or used equipment. A single machine can cost between $2,000 and $8,000, and you must also factor in initial inventory and licensing. Planning for a small cash reserve to handle early maintenance needs is a sensible approach.
faqItems.question: What are the typical startup costs for a vending machine business?

faqItems.answer: Securing locations requires researching areas with consistent foot traffic, such as office buildings, waiting rooms, or logistics hubs. You will need to pitch business owners or facility managers directly to discuss their team's needs. Many locations expect a small commission or utility agreement in exchange for the floor space.
faqItems.question: How do I secure profitable locations for my machines?

faqItems.answer: Operational requirements depend on your local municipality and state regulations. Most operators need a general business license, a sales tax permit, and specific food service or health department clearances. It is best to check with your local clerk's office before buying any equipment.
faqItems.question: What licenses and permits are required to operate?

faqItems.answer: Restocking schedules depend heavily on sales volume and product shelf life, with high-traffic spots requiring weekly visits. Regular cleaning and coin mechanism testing should be completed during every restock visit to prevent technical faults. Planning efficient routes can help minimize travel costs and maximize operational margins.
faqItems.question: How often do vending machines require restocking and maintenance?

input.body: Here are answers to some of the most common questions entrepreneurs ask when planning a new vending machine route.
input.title: Vending Business FAQ
